title: Llanfallteg Track Section
summary: Llanfallteg Track Section is an area displaying Ordovician stratigraphy that is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales.
text: Llanfallteg Track Section is an area displaying Ordovician stratigraphy that is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales.
